global_rules.animations: smooth, subtle, plant-growing metaphor (upward gentle translation with opacity)

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold font-['El_Messiri'] text-primary tracking-tight
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold font-['El_Messiri'] text-primary

rtl_specifics.alignment: Use text-start and text-end instead of text-left/text-right
rtl_specifics.margins_padding: Use ps-, pe-, ms-, me- instead of pl-, pr-, ml-, mr-
rtl_specifics.borders: Use border-s, border-e instead of border-l, border-r
rtl_specifics.icons: Mirror directional icons (e.g. arrows, chevrons) using 'transform scale-x-[-1]'
rtl_specifics.flex_direction: Flexbox automatically handles RTL when dir='rtl' is set on the html tag. Do not reverse flex-row manually.

buttons.primary: bg-[#87A96B] hover:bg-[#729352] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-['Tajawal'] font-bold transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:scale-95 text-base md:text-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F8F1E7] hover:bg-[#F2E8DA] text-[#8B5A2B] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-['Tajawal'] font-bold transition-all duration-300 border border-[#E2D8C9]
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#87A96B] text-[#87A96B] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-['Tajawal'] font-bold hover:bg-[#E8F0E1] transition-all duration-300

cards.default: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-8 shadow-sm border border-[#E2D8C9] hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-[#87A96B] cursor-pointer transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md flex flex-col items-center text-center
cards.selected: bg-[#E8F0E1] rounded-3xl p-6 border-2 border-[#87A96B] shadow-md flex flex-col items-center text-center

inputs.default: w-full bg-white border border-[#E2D8C9] rounded-2xl px-5 py-3 text-[#2D3748] font-['Tajawal'] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#87A96B] focus:border-transparent transition-all
inputs.label: block text-sm font-bold text-[#4A5568] mb-2 font-['Tajawal'] text-start

wizard_steps.container: flex items-center justify-between w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-12 relative
wizard_steps.line: absolute top-1/2 left-0 w-full h-1 bg-[#E2D8C9] -z-10 -translate-y-1/2
wizard_steps.line_progress: absolute top-1/2 right-0 h-1 bg-[#87A96B] -z-10 -translate-y-1/2 transition-all duration-500
wizard_steps.step_circle_active: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#87A96B] text-white flex items-center justify-center font-bold shadow-md ring-4 ring-white
wizard_steps.step_circle_pending: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#F8F1E7] text-[#8A9AB0] flex items-center justify-center font-bold ring-4 ring-white border border-[#E2D8C9]

landing.hero: Two-column grid on desktop (text pe-8, image ps-8), single column on mobile. Generous padding (py-20 md:py-32).
landing.how_it_works: Vertical timeline or 3-step horizontal cards with connecting dotted lines.
landing.categories: CSS Grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 or 4) with generous gap-6.

story_builder.action_bar: flex justify-between items-center mt-12 pt-6 border-t border-[#E2D8C9]

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (pe-6 border-e border-[#E2D8C9]) + Main Content area.
dashboard.grid: Grid of story cards (thumbnail, title, status pill, date).

admin.layout: Fixed sidebar on the right side (RTL), main content takes remaining width.
admin.tables: Clean Shadcn-style tables customized with softer borders, text-start alignment, and rounded-xl wrappers.

motion.page_load: Framer Motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }}

hero_background.description: Mother and daughter reading a book together on sofa - warm, nurturing vibe for hero section

story_courage.description: Father and son bonding - use for story examples or categories

story_values.description: Child proudly displaying artwork - use for personalization step or about us

story_empathy.description: Parent and child reading - alternative hero or how it works section

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure <html dir='rtl' lang='ar'> is set globally in the main layout.
Do not use generic Inter font. Apply El Messiri for headings and Tajawal for body globally.
Strictly avoid default dropdowns (<select>) in the Story Builder wizard. Use the specified card-based 'interactive' grids for selections.
Do NOT use any purple, violet, or dark neon themes. Stick entirely to the provided Organic Earthy palette (Cream, Sage Green, Gold, Warm Brown).
All containers must have generous padding to maintain the premium kids brand feel.
Buttons and cards must be heavily rounded (rounded-full, rounded-2xl, rounded-3xl).
When applying Framer Motion, use upward scaling motions (the 'Gheras/Planting' metaphor) instead of simple fades.
Test IDs are mandatory on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='start-story-btn'). Use role-based kebab-case.
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions but heavily customize their border radius, colors, and shadows to match this soft theme.
Never use raw text-left or text-right; always use logical properties text-start and text-end.
Ensure all icons that imply direction (back, forward, arrows) are mirrored for RTL.
